title: refactor: unify dashboard sections, panels, and buttons
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Tidying the hive
gist.blurb: We spent some time untangling the dashboard's UI components. Fewer wrapper divs, a single source of truth for colors, and a much happier codebase.
gist.summary: Refactored the dashboard UI to use unified layout primitives and a single theme palette, eliminating duplicated styles and unnecessary wrapper components.
gist.impact: The frontend codebase is now significantly cleaner, making it faster to build and maintain dashboard features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing colorful building blocks or painting a canvas, representing UI components and themes being unified and cleaned up.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, organizing colorful glowing blocks on a tidy wooden workbench. A retro computer monitor in the background displays clean, organized code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
